positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard or home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with email, password fields and a Login/Submit button
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI (e.g., header or profile section)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid registered email and correct password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated regardless of email case, and is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the email/username field (uppercase version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Application trims whitespace from the email input and successfully authenticates the user
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter '  testd1051@gmail.com  ' (with leading and trailing spaces) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with leading and trailing whitespace trimmed from email field

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during entry and user is successfully logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Click on the password input field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify that the entered characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Verify password field masks characters during input

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User can log out and then successfully log back in with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Click the Logout button or link
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field again
Enter the valid password in the password field again
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is successfully redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout and re-login with valid credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are present, accessible, and functional; user can log in successfully
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the page title or heading related to login is displayed
Verify the email/username input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the Login/Submit button is visible and clickable
Verify any 'Forgot Password' link is displayed (if applicable)
Verify any 'Sign Up' or 'Register' link is displayed (if applicable)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Verify login page UI elements are present and accessible

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message indicating the email field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the email/username field empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty email/username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Password is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are shown for both the email and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the email/username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify error messages are displayed for both fields (e.g., 'Email is required' and 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with both email and password fields empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and a generic authentication error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect email or password'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid email but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an error message is displayed indicating the account does not exist or credentials are invalid
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'nonexistentuser_xyz@fakeemail.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'SomePassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Account not found'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with an unregistered or non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented with a client-side or server-side validation message indicating the email format is invalid
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'invalidemail@@domain..com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a format validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with an invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application safely handles the SQL injection attempt, login is rejected, and no unauthorized access is granted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter '\' OR '1'='1'; --' in the email/username field
Enter 'anypassword' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed and no sensitive data is exposed
Verify the application does not crash or behave unexpectedly
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in the email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected as whitespace-only password should not be accepted as a valid credential
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter '     ' (five whitespace characters) in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Password is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with password containing only whitespace characters
